response.global_analysis: 1. Songs & Dialogue: Transcribed the opening banter between syudou (Shido) and Mori Calliope, followed by the performance of 'LET'S JUST CRASH' and the English speaking segment, ending with the intro vocals of 'Blue World' by Nerissa Ravencroft. 2. Reference JSON: Guided scene identification, but lyrics were mostly omitted in the reference JSON, requiring manual transcription of the Japanese verses, rap segments, and English dialogue. 3. Timing: Meticulously synchronized subtitle starts/ends to the vocalizations, ensuring accurate division during fast-paced segments to keep readability high. All non-vocal sections are appropriately kept silent.

subtitles.original: カリさん呼んでくれてありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Calli-san, thank you for inviting me!

subtitles.original: いえいえ、こちらこそ！
subtitles.english: No, thank you!

subtitles.original: じゃあ、それで聞いてくださいね。でも、しゅどうさん？
subtitles.english: Now, please listen to this. But, Syudou-san?

subtitles.original: 紹介してください！
subtitles.english: Please introduce it!

subtitles.original: それではお聴きください。
subtitles.english: Then please listen.

subtitles.original: LET'S JUST CRASH!
subtitles.english: LET'S JUST CRASH!

subtitles.original: Hey hey, everyone!
subtitles.english: Hey hey, everyone!

subtitles.original: Yeah! Let's go!
subtitles.english: Yeah! Let's go!

subtitles.original: Let's go! Hey!
subtitles.english: Let's go! Hey!

subtitles.original: You got eyes and ears but you don't look or listen!
subtitles.english: You got eyes and ears but you don't look or listen!

subtitles.original: In other words, you're useless, every last one of you!
subtitles.english: In other words, you're useless, every last one of you!

subtitles.original: And that is why I'm gonna send you all to hell!
subtitles.english: And that is why I'm gonna send you all to hell!

subtitles.original: All of humanity!
subtitles.english: All of humanity!

subtitles.original: 最悪を装って登場 そういうんじゃねえ
subtitles.english: Appearing dressed as the worst, it's not like that

subtitles.original: How unjust! Disgusted! You'll forget, so don't waste your sound!
subtitles.english: How unjust! Disgusted! You'll forget, so don't waste your sound!

subtitles.original: Get get get get get it, it's my turn, go and share, somebody's gotta pay while I live in the pain, like me now, I'm the one you can't tame, ah?
subtitles.english: Get get get get get it, it's my turn, go and share, somebody's gotta pay while I live in the pain, like me now, I'm the one you can't tame, ah?

subtitles.original: 天才で最低の天災 そういうんでいい
subtitles.english: A genius and the worst disaster, that's fine to call me

subtitles.original: 想いが募る場所に花咲く
subtitles.english: Flowers bloom where feelings grow stronger

subtitles.original: カラー
subtitles.english: Color

subtitles.original: Let's try, get back! Get trapped! 新しい敵を投げつけていくんだ
subtitles.english: Let's try, get back! Get trapped! I'll throw new enemies at them

subtitles.original: Let's just crash! 退屈な殻から殻に
subtitles.english: Let's just crash! From a boring shell to another shell

subtitles.original: All right! Lose control! 美しく散りそう
subtitles.english: All right! Lose control! About to scatter beautifully

subtitles.original: Heads will roll! 逃げ出してやるよ
subtitles.english: Heads will roll! I'm going to run away

subtitles.original: 誰だいったい？ 誰だってどうしたって この理想は無理だろって
subtitles.english: Who on earth is it? No matter who, no matter what, they say this ideal is impossible

subtitles.original: 叶えてこうぜ
subtitles.english: Let's make it come true

subtitles.original: Hey! Hey! Hey! Hey!
subtitles.english: Hey! Hey! Hey! Hey!

subtitles.original: One, five, yeah, get, plus two, let's play!
subtitles.english: One, five, yeah, get, plus two, let's play!

subtitles.original: 正解不正解の回答 どうだっていい
subtitles.english: Correct and incorrect answers, I don't care either way

subtitles.original: そんなんとっくに超えた場所に俺は立っている
subtitles.english: I'm standing in a place far beyond that

subtitles.original: Millions of problems, everybody's got 'em, and they can't be satisfied until somebody's at the bottom, so what, you think you're special 'cause you got some greedy hunger, we ain't getting any younger, thinking 'Let's just crash!'
subtitles.english: Millions of problems, everybody's got 'em, and they can't be satisfied until somebody's at the bottom, so what, you think you're special 'cause you got some greedy hunger, we ain't getting any younger, thinking 'Let's just crash!'

subtitles.original: 心が通う時に魂が先へ
subtitles.english: Sometimes our souls go forward when our hearts connect

subtitles.original: Let's try, get back! Get trapped! 新しい敵を投げつけていくんだ
subtitles.english: Let's try, get back! Get trapped! I'll throw new enemies at them

subtitles.original: 俺が通る今すぐにどけ！
subtitles.english: I'm passing through right now, get out of the way!

subtitles.original: Let's try, get back! Get trapped! 新しい敵を投げつけていくんだ
subtitles.english: Let's try, get back! Get trapped! I'll throw new enemies at them

subtitles.original: 退屈な殻から殻に
subtitles.english: From a boring shell to another shell

subtitles.original: All right! Lose control! 美しく散りそう
subtitles.english: All right! Lose control! About to scatter beautifully

subtitles.original: Heads will roll! 逃げ出してやるよ
subtitles.english: Heads will roll! I'm going to run away

subtitles.original: 誰だいったい？ 誰だってどうしたって この理想は無理だろって
subtitles.english: Who on earth is it? No matter who, no matter what, they say this ideal is impossible

subtitles.original: 叶えてこうぜ
subtitles.english: Let's make it come true

subtitles.original: Hey! Hey! Hey! Hey!
subtitles.english: Hey! Hey! Hey! Hey!

subtitles.original: Woo!
subtitles.english: Woo!

subtitles.original: しゅどうさんありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Syudou-san, thank you so much!

subtitles.original: Thank you Calliope!
subtitles.english: Thank you Calliope!

subtitles.original: 叶えてこうぜ
subtitles.english: Let's make it come true

subtitles.original: でも、まだまだ終わってないすね、みなさん！
subtitles.english: But it's not over yet, everyone!

subtitles.original: Let's just crash!
subtitles.english: Let's just crash!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！バイバイしゅどうさん！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much! Bye-bye, Syudou-san!

subtitles.original: Bye bye, thank you Dead Beats and Calliope!
subtitles.english: Bye-bye, thank you Dead Beats and Calliope!

subtitles.original: Peace!
subtitles.english: Peace!

subtitles.original: Ah, everyone, that was so fun. I really respect Shido-san as an artist. He does a lot of his work himself for his songs. You know, writes and composes and sings and everything. That's really cool. So, big ups to Shido-san.
subtitles.english: Ah, everyone, that was so fun. I really respect Shido-san as an artist. He does a lot of his work himself for his songs. You know, writes and composes and sings and everything. That's really cool. So, big ups to Shido-san.

subtitles.original: But, I think it is about time that maybe we get back to the future, the present where I'm performing with all my friends right now.
subtitles.english: But, I think it is about time that maybe we get back to the future, the present where I'm performing with all my friends right now.

subtitles.original: Yes, but that was a lot of fun. And, as I thought, right on time. It looks like it's time for me to get back to the future, and, go sing with all my friends again back in the present... future? I don't know, if that makes any sense. Let's go! See you there!
subtitles.english: Yes, but that was a lot of fun. And, as I thought, right on time. It looks like it's time for me to get back to the future, and, go sing with all my friends again back in the present... future? I don't know, if that makes any sense. Let's go! See you there!

subtitles.original: Walking an empty road
subtitles.english: Walking an empty road

subtitles.original: Nowhere for me to go
subtitles.english: Nowhere for me to go
